title: Xtra Sweet Polish Apple Pudding
description: A traditional Polish dessert featuring demerara sugar and a lazy-sunday twist, this pudding is perfect for a relaxing day at home, it is jain-friendly and does not include any animal products.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roll out the puff pastry and laminate it by folding and rolling several times.
In a large bowl, mix together the sliced apples, demerara sugar, and lemon juice.
In a separate bowl, mix together the flour, agar agar powder, and salt.
Add the dry ingredients to the apple mixture and stir until combined.
Roll out the laminated puff pastry and place it in a baking dish.
Pour the apple mixture into the pastry-lined baking dish.
Bake the pudding in the preheated oven for 40 minutes.
Remove the pudding from the oven and let it cool to room temperature.
Refrigerate the pudding for at least 2 hours to allow it to set.
